chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P.No.S-600 of 2020 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on MA-1655/2020 2. For orders on office objections 3. For hearing of MA-1656/2020 4. For hearing of main case. 18.12.2020. Mr. Javed Ali Buriro, advocate for petitioner. = 1. Urgency granted. 2. Deferred. 3. Granted subject to all just exceptions. 4. At the very outset, it is stated by the learned counsel for the petitioner that he would be satisfied and would not press the disposal of instant petition, if the operation of the warrant, which is issued against the petitioner for his arrest, in execution proceedings by family Court-VI, Hyderabad, is suspended for period of ten days, on execution of PR bond in sum of Rs.10,000/-to the satisfaction of Additional Registrar of this Court, in order to make it possible for the petitioner to contest/satisfy the execution proceedings against him before learned Family Court-VI, Hyderabad. Order accordingly. JUDGE Ahmed/Pa,
